title: Keybind Presets
description: Save and Load presets for your keybinds!
body:
# Keybind Presets

### This mod extends the keybinds menu to allow for saving and loading presets!


#### Presets Button in the Keybinds Menu
![img1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XdsybW1D/images/50a0d4ed0b39e3c3a7b0dfc7727388629016c763.png)

#### Presets Menu with Default and Opposite Movement presets saved
![img2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XdsybW1D/images/6c23cbb2e45c95e44a8cdba52da9371d8571ac60.png)

#### Keybinds menu after loading the Opposite Movement preset *(see strafe and walk binds)*
![img3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XdsybW1D/images/e1208ee841e4437de4a1cdf18e7e68397de9bc32.png)



### Notes
This mod is *compatible* with [Amecs](https://modrinth.com/mod/amecs) in that it won't break when both are used, however this mod will not be able to save and load the customized keybinds when using Amecs
